creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: gerald->ports

The update of the vobcopy port is now being tracked in PR 123283 
(submitted by the maintainer after I contacted him). 

Sadly, though I guess for obvious reasons, the mplayer port does 
not have an explicit maintainer, thus reassigning to ports@ for 
a possible update/fix.
